summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 24/7 Lead Generation System. All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend login, dashboard, and all navigation working correctly. System shows 111 total leads, 28 emails sent, 83 in queue.

minor.issue: Notion database ID is invalid (DIRECTORY_1_MAD_SEG) - expected behavior, needs valid UUID from user

issues: Fixed: Frequency text said '6 hours' but backend runs every hour

action_items: User needs to provide valid Notion database ID (UUID format) to enable Notion CRM sync
critical_code_review_comments: Notion integration gracefully handles invalid database ID - good error handling
24/7 automation scheduler is properly configured and running
Email queue service is active with 2 accounts configured
AI scoring service properly filters out large corporations/hospitals
seed_data_creation: Test created clinics with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. 18 backend tests in test_lead_management_api.py cover: health checks, automation status, dashboard stats, clinics CRUD, email management, contacts, discovery, PDF import, WhatsApp. Frontend has 6 pages: Login, Dashboard, Leads, Import, Prospección, Outreach, Config - all working. Notion integration requires valid database ID from user.
